title: Crypthub Trader
html: CryptHub is a powerful web application offering live chart data and comprehensive tools for tracking cryptocurrency prices, trends, and peer-to-peer trading, empowering users to make informed investment decisions in the dynamic world of cryptocurrencies.

title: GameFi Project
html: A GameFi project deploy on binance smart chain testnet with random rarity character upon open card. Player can sell and buy character at marketplace.

title: Coin Watch
html: A cryptocurrency tracking website that provides data on the latest cryptocurrency prices, market capitalization, and trading volumes, etc.

title: Final Year Project
html: A final year project — an educational game to raise awareness of epidemiology through quiz-based levels with in-game hints.

title: Movie Search Engine
html: A simple movie search engine using OMDb API

title: Linkedin Clone
html: Linkedin clone with firebase google authentication and post article function.

title: Amazon Clone
html: Amazon Clone with add to cart function and firebase authentication

title: Tesla Clone
html: Tesla clone frontpage with menu using react and redux
